definition: 5-digit county FIPS (state FIPS + county FIPS); modern canonical.
2-digit state FIPS.
Calendar year.
County name from PEP.
State name from PEP.
Annual resident population from Census PEP.
Median household income (nominal USD) from Census SAIPE.
All-ages poverty rate (percent) from Census SAIPE.
Median household income deflated to 2024 USD via CPI-U annual averages.
Annual average unemployment rate from BLS LAUS via the USDA ERS county-level data file. 2024 not yet released and is null.
Per-capita personal income (nominal USD) from BEA CAINC1 LineCode 3.
Per-capita personal income deflated to 2024 USD via CPI-U annual averages.
ACS 5y: share of population that is male.
ACS 5y: share of population non-Hispanic white alone (B03002).
ACS 5y: share of population non-Hispanic Black alone (B03002).
ACS 5y: share of population Hispanic or Latino, any race (B03002).
ACS 5y: share of population aged 15-24 (sum of male+female cells in B01001).
ACS 5y: share of population aged 25-44 (sum of male+female cells in B01001).
ACS 5y: share of adults 25+ with bachelor's degree or higher (B15003 numerator/denominator).
Tufts state firearm law count, joined down by state.
1 if state requires universal background checks (joined from state).
1 if state bans large-capacity magazines (joined from state).
1 if state bans assault weapons (joined from state).
1 if state has a gun violence restraining order / red-flag law (joined from state).
1 if state requires firearms be stored locked (joined from state).
1 if state requires permit to carry concealed (joined from state).
1 if state has may-issue concealed-carry permitting (joined from state).
1 if state requires waiting period for firearm purchases (joined from state).
1 if state has one-gun-per-month purchase limit (joined from state).
1 if state mandates relinquishment for MCDV (joined from state).
1 if state requires permit-to-purchase any firearm (joined from state).
